audit_items.proof_trace: The code checks feeAggregator balance alone (L257) for new-auction eligibility and auction-contract balance alone (L247) for ended-auction detection — it never sums both. However, the auction lifecycle enforces mutual exclusivity: `_onAuctionEnd` (L387-391) transfers all remaining balance back to feeAggregator before clearing `auctionStarts`, so `balanceOf(address(this), asset) == 0` whenever `auctionStart == 0`. When feeAggregator == address(this) (`hasFeeAggregator = false`), the check is trivially equivalent. In all reachable states, checking only feeAggregator balance is numerically identical to summing both.
